Operation 'productSearch' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is too long and reads like a description. Original description lacks clarity on inputs (keyword, refinements, pagination), outputs (paginated results, expandable fields), and use cases. Added specificity about refinement types, pagination support, expansion capabilities, and AI agent guidance on when to use this operation. Improved terminology consistency with API context (e.g., 'refinement filters', 'expand', 'pagination').

data.current_summary: Provides keyword and refinement-based search for products, returning only product ID, link, and name. Results are limited to products that are online and part of the site catalog.
data.current_description: Provide keyword and refinement search functionality for products. Only returns the product ID, link, and name in the product search hit. The search result only contains products that are online and assigned to the site catalog.
data.summary_suggestion: Search products by keyword and refinements
data.description_suggestion: Executes a product search using keyword queries and optional refinement filters (e.g., price range, category, promotion). Returns paginated search results containing matching products with ID, name, and link. Results are limited to online products assigned to the site catalog. Supports sorting, pagination, and optional expansion of product details including promotions, pricing, images, and variants. Use this endpoint to retrieve product listings for storefront display or to power search functionality.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too long and reads like a description. Original description lacks clarity on inputs (keyword, refinements, pagination), outputs (paginated results, expandable fields), and use cases. Added specificity about refinement types, pagination support, expansion capabilities, and AI agent guidance on when to use this operation. Improved terminology consistency with API context (e.g., 'refinement filters', 'expand', 'pagination').

message: Operation 'getSearchSuggestions' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description are vague about inputs and outputs. Missing context about minimum phrase length requirement, suggestion organization, and use case (search-as-you-type). Added clarity on what each suggestion type contains (IDs, names), the minimum length requirement, and the primary use case for AI agents to understand when to invoke this operation. Improved terminology consistency with API context (e.g., 'autocomplete', 'search phrase', 'suggestion types').

data.current_summary: Provides keyword-based search suggestions for products, categories, and brands. Returns suggested items for each based on the search phrase.
data.current_description: Provide keyword search functionality for products, categories, and brands suggestions. Returns suggested products, suggested categories, and suggested brands for the given search phrase.
data.summary_suggestion: Get search suggestions for products, categories, and brands
data.description_suggestion: Returns autocomplete suggestions based on a search phrase input. Provides suggested products (with ID and name), suggested categories (with ID and name), and suggested brands (with name) that match the search query. Useful for implementing search-as-you-type functionality to help shoppers discover relevant products and categories quickly. Requires a minimum search phrase length (configurable). Returns suggestions organized by type to support UI rendering of product, category, and brand suggestions separately.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are vague about inputs and outputs. Missing context about minimum phrase length requirement, suggestion organization, and use case (search-as-you-type). Added clarity on what each suggestion type contains (IDs, names), the minimum length requirement, and the primary use case for AI agents to understand when to invoke this operation. Improved terminology consistency with API context (e.g., 'autocomplete', 'search phrase', 'suggestion types').
